title: HABITAT CENTRAL LANE RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF CENTRAL LANE HABITAT CENTRAL LANE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. 1210 Oak Patch Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Saturday 11am-6pm, Sunday 11am-4pm Email (541) 344-4809 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-4809 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off W 11th Avenue Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MINOR HOME REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
